problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Combining Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
